name: Archidply Industries Limited
summary: Archidply Industries Limited manufactures and sells wood and paper based products in India. It offers decorative laminates; archidply, monarchply, silvi, and ojus plywoods; and PVC boards, WPC board, and hybrid WPC board. The company also manufactures tea under the Bordhumsa Tea brand name. It sells its products to banks and insurance, educational institutes, airports, government projects, hospitals, hotels, multiplexes, corporates, apartment complexes, retails, universities, and builders. The company also exports its products to 20 countries. Archidply Industries Limited was founded in 1976 and is based in New Delhi, India.
